name: com.unity.xr.androidxr-openxr
description: Enables you to build mixed reality apps for Android XR devices by implementing support for Android XR extensions.

_upm.changelog:
### Changed
- Updated the dependency version of the AR Foundation package to 6.3.0

### Fixed
- Restored XR Management package dependency (4.5.0) to ensure manifest changes are configured correctly for GameActivity.
- Fixed the trailing space issue with "android.hardware.xr.input.controller " in AndroidManifest
